nodes.name: SUMMARY.md
nodes.summary: Table of contents for the RisingWave developer documentation mdBook, organizing chapters on building, debugging, benchmarking, specialized topics, and architecture design docs.

nodes.name: ci.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide explaining the CI system, CI label conventions for controlling which tests run on pull requests, and how to use the main-cron bisect pipeline for regression hunting.

nodes.name: contributing.md
nodes.summary: Contribution guide covering finding tasks, running tests, submitting pull requests, PR title/description conventions, CLA signing, and cherry-picking to release branches.

nodes.name: debugging.md
nodes.summary: Brief debugging guide pointing to VS Code launch configuration for debugging the RisingWave playground locally.

nodes.name: intro.md
nodes.summary: Introduction to RisingWave developer documentation, orienting new contributors to design documents, code structure, and component relationships.

nodes.name: metrics.md
nodes.summary: Developer reference for key RisingWave performance metrics, focusing on barrier latency as an indicator of system health, processing cost, and buffer capacity utilization.

nodes.name: observability.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide to RisingWave observability tools including meta dashboard cluster control, Grafana monitoring, distributed tracing, the web dashboard, and log configuration.
